description: CARD semantic components should stack content vertically for proper content flow
dont: Leave layoutMode undefined or NONE for CARD

description: TEXT nodes must include lineHeight for proper text spacing and readability
do: Include lineHeight (e.g., { value: 150, unit: "PERCENT" }) for all TEXT nodes
dont: Leave lineHeight undefined on TEXT nodes

description: BUTTON semantic components need centered content for proper visual balance
do: Set primaryAxisAlignItems=CENTER and counterAxisAlignItems=CENTER for BUTTON
dont: Leave alignment properties undefined for BUTTON

description: HUG and FILL sizing modes only work when the parent has Auto Layout enabled
do: Ensure parent has layoutMode (VERTICAL or HORIZONTAL) before using HUG/FILL sizing
dont: Use HUG or FILL sizing on nodes whose parent has layoutMode=NONE

description: Root nodes (parent=null) cannot use FILL sizing as there is no parent to fill
do: Use layoutSizingHorizontal=FIXED and specify explicit width for root nodes
dont: Use FILL sizing on root nodes (will have no effect)

description: DIVIDER semantic needs specific structure: FILL width, FIXED height, no children
do: Set layoutSizingHorizontal=FILL, layoutSizingVertical=FIXED, height=1 for DIVIDER
dont: Give DIVIDER a layoutMode or children

description: Headings and labels should hug their content to avoid unnecessary space
do: Set textAutoResize=WIDTH_AND_HEIGHT and layoutSizing=HUG for HEADING/LABEL
dont: Use FILL sizing or fixed dimensions for headings

description: Paragraphs should fill container width and auto-adjust height
do: Set textAutoResize=HEIGHT and layoutSizingHorizontal=FILL for PARAGRAPH/BODY
dont: Use HUG or fixed width for paragraph text

description: Containers with HUG sizing and no children will collapse to 0px
do: Ensure HUG containers have at least one child, or use FIXED sizing with explicit dimensions

description: Icon-only buttons should be square with fixed dimensions
do: Set equal width and height, layoutMode=HORIZONTAL, and center alignment
dont: Use HUG sizing for icon buttons (may result in inconsistent sizes)

description: TEXT color should be provided via fills. Using strokes on TEXT is incorrect and may render unexpectedly.
do: Set text color via fills on TEXT nodes (e.g., fills: ["#202020"]).
dont: Add strokes to TEXT nodes for text color.

issue: TEXT must have fills (avoid invisible text)
description: TEXT nodes without fills risk rendering invisible or defaulting unpredictably.
do: Always provide a fills color for TEXT nodes.
dont: Leave fills empty or undefined on TEXT nodes.

description: Strokes are primarily used for borders (inputs, dividers, outline variants). Overusing strokes on containers creates visual noise and inconsistent rendering.
do: Use strokes for TEXT_FIELD/TEXT_AREA/DIVIDER semantics or explicit outline variants.
dont: Add strokes to generic containers (CARD/BUTTON/DEFAULT) unless intentionally outline/bordered.

issue: Containers with children should use Auto Layout
description: Frames that contain multiple children should use Auto Layout to avoid manual positioning drift and broken sizing behavior.
do: Set layoutMode=VERTICAL or HORIZONTAL on containers that have children.
dont: Use layoutMode=NONE on containers with multiple children.

description: Components with known, deterministic dimensions (e.g., AVATAR/BADGE/SWITCH) should use FIXED sizing to avoid unstable HUG/FILL behavior.
do: Use layoutSizing=FIXED and specify explicit width/height for known-size components.
dont: Use HUG sizing for known-size components unless the component is genuinely content-driven.
